inputs.label: Number of Pomodoros
inputs.businessContext: How many pomodoro sessions you want to complete.

businessContext_i18n.en: How many pomodoro sessions you want to complete.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie viele Pomodoro-Sitzungen Sie absolvieren möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Combien de sessions pomodoro vous souhaitez effectuer.

inputs.label: Work Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of one pomodoro work session.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one pomodoro work session.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée d'une session de travail Pomodoro.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de una sesión de trabajo pomodoro.

inputs.label: Short Break Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of short break after each pomodoro, except before a long break.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of short break after each pomodoro, except before a long break.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her pomodorodan sonraki kısa mola süresi, uzun moladan önceki hariç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge der kurzen Pause nach jedem Pomodoro, außer vor einer langen Pause.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de la pause courte après chaque pomodoro, sauf avant une pause longue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la pausa corta después de cada pomodoro, excepto antes de una pausa larga.

inputs.label: Long Break Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of long break after completing a set of pomodoros.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of long break after completing a set of pomodoros.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir dizi pomodoro tamamlandıktan sonraki uzun mola süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge der langen Pause nach Abschluss einer Reihe von Pomodoros.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de la pause longue après avoir terminé un ensemble de pomodoros.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la pausa larga después de completar una serie de pomodoros.

inputs.label: Pomodoros Before Long Break
inputs.businessContext: Number of pomodoro sessions before a long break is taken.

label_i18n.es: Pomodoros antes de la pausa larga

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of pomodoro sessions before a long break is taken.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uzun mola öncesinde yapılan pomodoro oturumu sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Pomodoro-Sitzungen, bevor eine lange Pause eingelegt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de sessions pomodoro avant une pause longue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de sesiones pomodoro antes de tomar una pausa larga.

inputs.label: Start Time (minutes from midnight)
inputs.businessContext: Time of day when you start the first pomodoro, in minutes from midnight (e.g., 8:00 AM = 480).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time of day when you start the first pomodoro, in minutes from midnight (e.g., 8:00 AM = 480).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk pomodoroya başlama zamanı, gece yarısından itibaren dakika cinsinden (örneğin, 08:00 = 480).
businessContext_i18n.de: Tageszeit, zu der Sie den ersten Pomodoro starten, in Minuten ab Mitternacht (z. B. 8:00 Uhr = 480).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heure de début du premier pomodoro, en minutes depuis minuit (ex. 8h00 = 480).
businessContext_i18n.es: Hora del día en que comienza el primer pomodoro, en minutos desde medianoche (ej., 8:00 AM = 480).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
